Home › Lake County › Lowest Health Scores

Restaurants With the Lowest Health Scores in Lake County

No sugar-coating it: these 19 Lake County restaurants scored a D or F at their most recent Florida health inspection, COPACABANA CUBAN CAFE lowest of all at 46/100. The state records the violations; we just rank them, worst first.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • F 46 C
    COPACABANA CUBAN CAFE Cuban ★ 4.1 (2698) Mount Dora · Lake County VeganVeg +6 more Violations: 3 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 8 basic Inspected Mar 2026
  • F 46 R
    ROBATA JAPANESE STEAKHOUSE Japanese ★ 4.2 (1351) Clermont · Lake County VegGF +6 more Violations: 2 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 16 basic Inspected Apr 2026
  • F 49 R
    ROSE PLANTATION American ★ 4.5 (1176) Fruitland Park · Lake County VeganVeg +3 more Violations: 4 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 5 basic Inspected May 2026
  • F 52 N
    NEW CHINESE BUFFET INC Chinese ★ 4.1 (1558) Clermont · Lake County VegDF +1 more Violations: 3 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 12 basic Inspected Oct 2025
  • F 53 T
    TAKIS RESTAURANT Italian ★ 4.2 (1599) Leesburg · Lake County VegHealthy Violations: 5 high-priority, 7 basic Inspected Apr 2026
  • F 57 C
    CROOKED SPOON GASTROPUB American ★ 4.4 (2787) Clermont · Lake County VeganVeg +2 more Violations: 3 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 8 basic Inspected Jun 2026
  • F 58 C
    CARRABBA'S ITALIAN GRILL Italian ★ 4.3 (2179) The Villages · Lake County VegGF +3 more Violations: 3 high-priority, 8 basic Inspected May 2026
  • D 60 O

    PUDDLE JUMPERS American ★ 4.3 (2610) Tavares · Lake County VeganVeg +1 more Violations: 1 high-priority, 4 intermediate, 17 basic Inspected Jan 2026

    MARY'S KOUNTRY KITCHEN American ★ 4.7 (1925) Tavares · Lake County Violations: 2 high-priority, 3 intermediate, 10 basic Inspected Mar 2026

    SAN JOSES ORIGINAL MEXICAN RESTAURANT Mexican ★ 4.5 (2023) Clermont · Lake County VeganVeg +1 more Violations: 3 high-priority, 2 intermediate, 4 basic Inspected Nov 2025
